reviews.comment:
Bien, normal, baño limpio, lo único es que hay que esperar bastante debido a la cantidad de gente que carga combustible allí a pesar de que cerca hay otra estación de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Okay, normal, clean bathroom, the only thing is that you have to wait quite a while due to the number of people filling up there even though there is another gas station nearby.

reviews.comment:
En Jachal nadie anda a las corridas solo los autos y la gente es muy paciente demás y recuerden que no lo pagan por personas que atienden si no por Hora asi que hay que esperar por que no solo es el Lema de la Provincia de San esa estación de Servicios es de todos los que la visitan y quedan desesperados al paso de Pan y Queso jajajaja, pero bueno armarse de paciencia y  tomarse unos termos por que solo son dos personas me parece las que atienden la Playa y los fines de Semana es tremendo si.. pero para el que valla a conocer es sus vacaciones nervios de acero, ;)

(Translated by Google)
In Jachal nobody is rushing, only cars and people are very patient too and remember that they don't pay for people who serve but for Hour so you have to wait because it's not only the motto of the Province of San that Service Station belongs to all who visit it and are left desperate at the passage of Pan y Queso hahahaha, but well arm yourself with patience and take some thermoses because there are only two people I think that serve the Beach and on weekends it is tremendous yes .. but for those who go to know it is their vacation nerves of steel, ;)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBc3FpMlR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Como todo en provincia hay q tener paciencia para q te atiendan, ni hablar si vas tipo 18 hs.

(Translated by Google)
Like everything in the provinces, you have to be patient to get served, especially if you go around 6 pm.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBNklMR1V3EAE
